/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/example_glfw_vulkan.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/example_glfw_vulkan.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_glfw_vulkan.dir/mnt/1337/Projects/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_glfw_vulkan.dir/mnt/1337/Projects/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_glfw_vulkan.dir/mnt/1337/Projects/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_glfw_vulkan.dir/mnt/1337/Projects/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_glfw_vulkan.dir/mnt/1337/Projects/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_glfw_vulkan.dir/mnt/1337/Projects/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_glfw_vulkan.dir/mnt/1337/Projects/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp.o -o example_glfw_vulkan  glfw_build/src/libglfw3.a /lib/libvulkan.so -lm -lpthread -ldl -lX11 /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl
